package.name: grid_mapping
package.description: Occupancy grid mapping with known poses for ROS 2 Humble. Implements the log-odds occupancy grid mapping algorithm with an inverse sensor model and Bresenham ray tracing, as introduced in Probabilistic Robotics (Thrun et al., Chapter 9). Subscribes to /scan and /odom, publishes /grid_map as OccupancyGrid.
